name: Smoked Chili Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 can Chipotle chiles in adobo sauce
1 tablespoon strong red wine vinegar or balsamic to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the chipotle chiles and boiling water together in a food processor or blender until smooth.
2. Add the tomato paste, red wine vinegar or balsamic vinegar, and brown sugar.
3. Blend again until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Taste the salsa and adjust the flavorings as desired.
5. Serve with beans, eggs, or in soups.
